statusMessage:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 3:14
  |
3 |        WHEN n:A1 THEN (n)-->(:B1)
  |              ^---
  |
  = expected kw_and, kw_or, kw_xor, kw_in, kw_then, kw_is, string_cmp_expr, prop_access, map_projection, subscript, cmp_op, add_op, or mul_op}
Cypher: MATCH (n)
WITH CASE
       WHEN n:A1 THEN (n)-->(:B1)
       WHEN n:A2 THEN (n)-->(:B2)
       ELSE 42
     END AS p, count(n) AS c
RETURN p, c
